acceptance_criteria:
1. call() returns Result<S, PredictError>
2. call_with_meta() returns Result<CallResult<S>, PredictError>
3. System message formatted with BAML schema
4. Demos formatted as user/assistant pairs
5. User message includes input fields
6. LM called with tools
7. Response parsed with jsonish
8. Output assembled via S::from_parts
9. Errors mapped to correct PredictError variants
title: Implement call() and call_with_meta() methods
